title: BORN HERE — FINAL DIRECTOR'S CUT V8
episodeObjective: Cross or resist the Door, investigate why the structure recognizes Eva and Noah, and reveal that Eva is not merely inside Omega—she is part of it.
rulesApplied: Humanization Pass V4: Eva experiences the structure physically and emotionally before lore is revealed.
ECHO V5 consequence pass: choices create persistent Episode 18 flags.
Episode 16 V8 continuity preserved: Eva was born here and the Door remembers her.
AEON is not the central mystery; Omega and the Door are.
UNKNOWN pushes story with concrete clues.
Every visible choice group has exactly two choices.

origin_identity_correlation_17.title: ORIGIN IDENTITY CORRELATION
origin_identity_correlation_17.description: Match each recovered identity trace with the correct conclusion.

events.text: It looks like someone left yesterday.
It looks like it was waiting for me.
My boots kept trying to move.
I had to lock my knees.
Something in here knows the shape of me.
Like it recognizes something and doesn't want to say it.

events.title: STRUCTURE ORIGIN SCAN
events.content:
SURFACE AGE: NONLINEAR
DUST: NONE
CORROSION: NONE
ENVIRONMENTAL DECAY: ABSENT
BIOLOGICAL RESIDUE: EVA THORNE / NATIVE MATCH
NOTE: structure is not preserved. It is current.
events.caption: The structure is not merely old; it appears current to Eva's biometric pattern.
events.message: [STRUCTURE ORIGIN SCAN ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.text: Don't answer anything it asks you.
You answer one wrong and something opens.
You keep thinking the danger is behind the next panel.
Like remembering a song I never learned.
There's someone wearing my face in the memory.

events.title: RECOVERED MEMORY: RETURN EVENT
events.content:
SUBJECT: EVA THORNE
STATUS: PARTIALLY RECOVERED

Door Opened
Noah Echo Accepted
Eva Biometric Confirmed
Signal Lost
Return Event Pending

WARNING: This memory is not stored in the archive. It is stored in the structure.
events.caption: Recovered memory appears to belong to the structure, not the station archive.

events.title: BIOMETRIC SCAN
events.content:
MATCH TARGET: EVA THORNE
MATCH RATE: 97.4%
CLASSIFICATION: NATIVE / ORIGIN MATCH
CONFLICT: Eva Thorne has no external birth record.
SECONDARY MATCH: NOAH VOSS ECHO PATTERN DETECTED
events.caption: Biometric scan identifies Eva as native to the structure and Noah as an echo pattern.

events.text: But I need one second where I am just me.
That's the first sane thing you've said in hours.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Put identity where it actually belongs.
That is not a sentence humans should have to say.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Like the wall is remembering it used to be a hallway.
I hate that I know the color.
There are marks on the wall.
When I look away, I can still read them.
There's another chamber behind this door.
I don't know why I know that word.

events.speaker: UNKNOWN
events.text: YOU WERE NOT THE ONLY ONE.

episode18UsageNotes.noahProtected: Noah begins Episode 18 safer but resentful or blind to some structure echoes.
episode18UsageNotes.noahOverexposed: Noah begins Episode 18 unstable and more likely to speak with borrowed memories.
episode18UsageNotes.evaStabilizedBeforeOrigin: Eva trusts the operator more and resists Omega pull slightly better.
episode18UsageNotes.innerChamberOpened: Episode 18 has more physical access but more danger.
episode18UsageNotes.memoryWallRead: Episode 18 has more lore clues but fewer physical protections.
episode18UsageNotes.askedUsMeaning: Omega plurality is active and should affect UNKNOWN voice behavior.
episode18UsageNotes.pulledEvaBackFromUs: Eva may resist the operator less but the Nursery remains partially closed.
episode18UsageNotes.evaPartOfOmegaRevealed: Episode 18 must treat Eva as connected to Omega, not merely trapped in it.
episode18UsageNotes.sealNurseryEpisode18: Episode 18 opens with the Nursery sealed but still transmitting.

directorCut.coreRewrite: Rebuilt from the provided Episode 17 JSON. The generic structure/AEON chamber was replaced with a Door/Nursery origin reveal.
majorChanges: Episode objective changed from inspecting structure to investigating Eva's origin inside Omega.
Eva becomes physically and emotionally affected by the structure.
Noah and Hale are active and reactive.
UNKNOWN now pushes identity/origin story instead of generic welcome messages.
Added irreversible-style branch: cut Noah feed or keep him connected.
Biometric match is upgraded to native/origin match.
Final reveal: Eva was not the only one; there is a Nursery.
Episode 18 hook branches between entering or sealing the Nursery.
